name: Fried Stuffed Jalapeno Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz can of whole pickled jalapeno peppers, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from the peppers using a small sharp knife (do not split them).
2. Carefully remove seeds with the same knife.
3. Stuff each pepper with pimiento cheese.
4. Cover and chill for at least two hours.
5. In a bowl, combine 1/4 cup flour, 2 tablespoons cornmeal, salt, and pepper.
6. Set this batter aside.
7. In another bowl, mix the remaining 1/2 cup flour and 1/4 cup cornmeal.
8. Dip each stuffed pepper in the batter, then dredge in the flour mixture.
9. Heat vegetable oil to a depth of 2 to 3 inches in a Dutch oven until it reaches 375°F (190°C).
10. Fry peppers one at a time for 1 to 2 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
11. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
Yield: about 12 appetizers.
